---
title: "Home"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

I've been learning R, Python, and Bioinformatics for the last 3-5 years. So 
I thought I'd start to write down some of the things I've learned, mostly as a
record for myself but also maybe as a helpful resource for others. 

Check out the [About](/about/) page for personal information.

## Blog Posts:
